mapper.sql: id, trade_date, trade_time, symbol, name, side, price, quantity, amount, position_ratio, plan_id, reason, plan_stop_loss, plan_take_profit, followed_plan, emotion_tags, mistake_tags, actual_result, review_status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM trade_journal WHERE id IN
#{id}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM trade_journal WHERE trade_date = #{tradeDate}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM trade_journal WHERE review_status = #{reviewStatus}
